meta.description: Displays structured tabular data with defined columns.

mcp_tool_definition.name: render_data_table
mcp_tool_definition.description: Use this to display a list or breakdown of multiple items in a structured table format.

columns.description: Array of column definitions with header and accessorKey

dataSource.description: The registered data source to fetch table rows from

dataSourceParams.description: Optional filters for the data source
